message.content:
# TrackTV Mobile App Design System Analysis

## 1. COLOR PALETTE
- **Primary Yellow (Header/Branding)**: `#FFC107` (brand color)
- **White (Background)**: `#FFFFFF` (main background)
- **Black (Text/Icons)**: `#000000` (primary text)
- **Light Gray (Status Bar/Secondary Text)**: `#757575` (status bar icons)
- **Dark Gray (Navigation)**: `#212121` (bottom nav icons)
- **Light Gray (Borders/Dividers)**: `#E0E0E0` (subtle borders)
- **Yellow Heart Icon**: `#FFC107` (accent color)

## 2. TYPOGRAPHY
- **Font Family**: Sans-serif (likely Roboto or similar)
- **Header Text ("TrackTV")**: 
  - Weight: Bold (700)
  - Size: 24px (1.5rem)
  - Letter-spacing: 0.5px
- **Time Display ("07:04")**:
  - Weight: Medium (500)
  - Size: 16px (1rem)
  - Letter-spacing: 0.25px
- **Body Text**: Not visible in this screen
- **Icon Text**: Not visible in this screen

## 3. LAYOUT
- **Screen Structure**: 
  - Status bar at top (24px height)
  - Header section (64px height) with yellow background
  - Main content area (remaining height)
- **Padding/Margins**:
  - Status bar padding: 8px (top/bottom)
  - Header padding: 16px (left/right)
  - Content area padding: 24px (top) + 16px (left/right)
- **Spacing System**:
  - Small spacing: 8px
  - Medium spacing: 16px
  - Large spacing: 24px
- **Grid System**: Not visible in this screen

## 4. COMPONENTS
- **Header Component**:
  - Yellow background (`#FFC107`)
  - "TrackTV" text in black (bold, 24px)
  - Play icon (white, 24px)
- **Status Bar Component**:
  - Time display (16px, medium weight)
  - Status icons (battery, Wi-Fi, signal) in light gray
- **Illustration Component**:
  - Phone icon with yellow top bar
  - Speech bubble with yellow heart
  - Line art style with minimal colors
- **Bottom Navigation Bar**:
  - Not visible in this screen but implied by mobile context

## 5. NAVIGATION
- **Bottom Navigation Bar** (implied):
  - 5 items (standard mobile pattern)
  - Icons (dark gray, 24px)
  - Labels (not visible in this screen)
- **Header Navigation**:
  - No visible navigation elements in this screen

## 6. SCREENS
- **Current Screen**: Onboarding/intro screen
  - Contains app branding ("TrackTV")
  - Illustration of phone with heart icon
  - Status bar with time
- **Other Screens** (implied):
  - Main dashboard (likely)
  - TV show listings
  - Search screen
  - Profile screen
  - Settings screen

## 7. DESIGN PATTERN
- **Theme**: Light theme with yellow accent
- **Layout Style**: Card-based (though no cards visible in this screen)
- **Aesthetic**: Clean, minimal, modern with flat design
- **Visual Style**: Illustration-based with simple line art and limited color palette

## 8. SPECIFIC DETAILS
- **Shadows**: None visible in this screen
- **Borders**: None visible in this screen
- **Border Radius**: Not applicable (no rounded elements visible)
- **Icon Styles**:
  - Play icon: White, 24px, simple geometric shape
  - Status icons: Light gray, 16px, standard mobile icons
- **Image Treatments**:
  - Illustration: Line art with yellow and white colors
  - No photos or complex images visible
- **Status Bar**:
  - Black background
  - White time text
  - Light gray status icons
- **Phone Frame**:
  - Black bezel
  - Rounded corners (standard iPhone style)
  - Notch at top center

## Additional Notes
- The prototype appears to be a walkthrough screen for a TV show tracking app
- The design uses a very limited color palette focusing on yellow as the primary brand color
- The layout is clean and uncluttered with plenty of white space
- The illustration style is consistent with modern mobile app design trends
- The status bar follows iOS conventions with time on left and status icons on right

This design system would be suitable for recreating the app as a web application using modern CSS frameworks with attention to the specific color values, typography, and layout patterns identified above.
